title: Magic Pencil
bio: Fizzwick Point is a magic pencil who draws tiny doors where there should be margins. He feels mischievous, sneezes sparkles, and keeps a moon crumb stuck to his eraser.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a long thin rectangle for the pencil body. Add a triangle tip on one end and a small rectangle eraser on the other.
steps.hint: Make the pencil a little diagonal so it feels magical and active.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two small eyes on the pencil body. Add one raised eyebrow, one low eyebrow, and a tiny smirk.
steps.hint: Uneven eyebrows make Fizzwick look delightfully sneaky.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add stripes near the tip, a band near the eraser, sparkle dots, and a tiny drawn door beside the pencil point.
steps.hint: The door can be a small rounded rectangle with one dot knob.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the pencil shape, tip, eraser, face, bands, sparkles, and tiny door with clear simple lines.
steps.hint: Keep the pencil edges straight, but let the sparkles stay playful.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the pencil, tip, eraser, and accents. Add a soft shadow below and tiny glowing dots near the point.
steps.hint: Place the brightest accent near the pencil tip to show where the magic starts.
